# Fimber Elemuwa

> B2B SaaS Technical Content Writer. Fimber Elemuwa writes technical tutorials, API documentation, and product-led content for B2B SaaS companies. Clients include LogRocket, Permify, Decodo, and Refine.

## Main pages

- [Portfolio home](https://fimberelemuwa.com/): Services, selected work, experience, testimonials, and contact.
- [Technical blog](https://fimberelemuwa.com/blog): Technical articles on B2B SaaS, developer tooling, security, scraping, and content strategy.

## Articles

- [Building Fine-Grained Role Based Access Control (RBAC) in React Apps](https://fimberelemuwa.com/writing/post-rbac-react): Deep dive into implementing flexible permissions, guarding routes, and managing user roles dynamically in modern component architectures.
- [The Developer's Handbook to Bypassing Modern Anti-Bot Firewalls](https://fimberelemuwa.com/writing/post-anti-bot-scraping): Understand IP rotation, custom header emulation, TLS fingerprinting, and automated stealth proxies to build resilient scrapers.
- [How to Write Product-Led Content That Engineers Actually Respect](https://fimberelemuwa.com/writing/post-product-led-content): Stop writing clickbait. Learn how to craft code-first, developer-focused articles that show your product solving real issues without being cheesy.

## External portfolio

- [Developer documentation portfolio (Mintlify)](https://hackmamba-3f164318.mintlify.app/): Live API and product documentation samples.
